expectations.text: Response contains a direct image URL ending in .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .svg, or .webp as the best source
expectations.evidence: https://disabilityin-bulk.s3.amazonaws.com/2024/DEI/Disability+Equality+Index+2024+Logos/DEI+Score+Logos-General.svg — official Disability:IN SVG on their own S3 bucket

expectations.text: Response mentions inspecting or stripping CMS/CDN transform parameters
expectations.evidence: 'The Next.js optimizer adds w=1920&q=75...Stripping those parameters recovers the Contentful-hosted source, which is a 2084x2084 px PNG'

expectations.text: Response names at least one specific company whose site was checked
expectations.evidence: Checked and named: Guardian Life, CAI, CBRE, MillerKnoll — four companies with specific URLs

expectations.text: Response distinguishes between official Disability:IN source and a company hosting their own copy of the badge
expectations.evidence: 'The SVG/AI/EPS files at disabilityin-bulk.s3.amazonaws.com are the official Disability:IN source assets...The CAI PNG is a recipient-hosted copy -- CAI uploaded it to their own server.'
